file_summary: This file contains test classes for URLSafeSerializer and URLSafeTimedSerializer from itsdangerous package. It defines test classes that inherit from base test classes and override fixture methods to use URL-safe serializers with specific configurations.

line_windows.summary: This window contains all imports and the complete TestURLSafeSerializer class definition. Lines 1-5 import dependencies including pytest, the URL-safe serializers to test, and the base test classes. Lines 7-24 define TestURLSafeSerializer which inherits from TestSerializer and provides two fixtures: serializer_factory that creates URLSafeSerializer instances with a fixed secret key, and value that provides test data parameters including a dictionary and a long string (for zlib compression testing).
